city_report.transport: Flytoget (Airport Express Train), operates high speed express trains, generally taking 19-22 minutes to reach Oslo Central Station (Oslo S). Trains to Oslo Central Station depart every 10 minutes on weekdays from 07.00 to 23.10, Sundays from 11.30 to 23.10, and every 20 minutes at other times (04.40-06.50 and 23.10-00.50 everyday, 07.20-11.20 Sundays, and all-day during Saturdays and bank holidays). Every 20 minutes from 05.30 to 00.50, the train also calls at Lillestrøm and continues past Oslo S to Drammen, stopping at Nationaltheatret station, which is more convenient for destinations in the western end of the city .

attraction.name: Vigeland Park
attraction.description: Large park with sculptures by Gustav Vigeland.

attraction.name: Opera House
attraction.description: Modern architectural landmark with a walkable roof.

attraction.name: Akershus Fortress
attraction.description: Medieval castle built to protect and provide a royal residence.

attraction.name: Fram Museum
attraction.description: Museum dedicated to Norwegian polar exploration.

attraction.name: Munch Museum
attraction.description: Museum dedicated to the life and works of Edvard Munch.

attraction.name: Kon-Tiki Museum
attraction.description: Museum housing vessels from Thor Heyerdahl's expeditions.

attraction.name: National Gallery
attraction.description: Home to Norway's largest collection of art (The Scream).

attraction.name: City Hall
attraction.description: Iconic building hosting the Nobel Peace Prize ceremony.

attraction.name: Karl Johans Gate
attraction.description: The main street of Oslo connecting the station and palace.

city_report.description: Capitale mondiale della mobilità elettrica, Oslo è circondata da foreste e fiordi che penetrano fino in centro. Rappresenta il picco della sostenibilità ambientale unita a una stabilità economica granitica.
city_report.wiki_intro: '''Oslo''' is Norway's capital and largest city, with 700,000 citizens in the city proper and about 1.5 million inhabitants in greater Oslo. It is in East Norway|the East of the country in the Oslofjorden fjords of Norway|fjord, extending over an inlet of the Skagerrak strait. It is spaciously laid out and surrounded by green hills and mountains and includes 40 islands and 343 lakes. Oslo offer...
